Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals extreme momentum concentration in technology-adjacent names, with BE dominating the rankings at score 96.6 and a stunning 1485.81% one-year return that dwarfs broader market indices by over 1455 percentage points. BE's momentum is flagged as "overextended," signaling that while its short-term acceleration is genuine (4 out of 4 ratio consistency checks pass and it clears all SMA gates), the trajectory appears unsustainably steep; notably, its 3-month-to-1-month ratio drops to 0.77, indicating decelerating gains at intermediate timeframes. ANAB ranks second with a more moderate but still exceptional 350.78% annual return and 177.24% six-month return, suggesting a more balanced momentum profile across timeframes with stronger 3-month and 6-month acceleration ratios (1.45 and 1.59 respectively). Both leaders pass all technical gates and maintain positive resilience versus SPY on down days, but the dashboard appears dominated by a small cohort of extraordinary performers, with BE's outsized gains potentially reflecting sector rotation or concentrated positioning rather than broad-based momentum strength.
